docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $11,400.00 FILED BY WU, MARY AS TO DEFENDANT AUTO REPAIR CENTER ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-28-2025 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506

REQUEST TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF WU, MARY ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVICE FEE: $50.00 (WAIVED) SERVED MAR-07-2025, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT AUTO REPAIR CENTER
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) ZHAOBIN CHEN FILED BY DEFENDANT AUTO REPAIR CENTER

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF APR-28-2025 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF APR-28-2025 BY VISITING JUDGE JOHN TRUE. APPEARANCES: PLAINTIFF MARY WU IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT AUTO REPAIR CENTER (ZHAOBIN CHEN) IS PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: M. DE LUNA. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-28-2025 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF WU, MARY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT AUTO REPAIR CENTER $699.08 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $699.08, (ALTERNATOR) $317.01 + (BATTERY) $246.36 + (LYFT) $135.71 = $699.08 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
